final:
module increment_by_two (
    input obf_clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 2;
        end
    end
endmodule
